sigWerErrors.reason: Omitting 'tôi' (I) changes the subject of the sentence, which can significantly alter the meaning and who is being referred to.
'đâu' (at all) and 'rồi' (already) have different meanings and change the intent of the sentence from a refusal to an acceptance, which is a significant change in meaning.
